news.title:
Varun Beverages Ltd surged 3.2% intraday on 5 Mar 2026, hitting Rs 444.4.
The stock outperformed Beverages sector and Sensex after a 3-day decline.
news.summary:
Varun Beverages Ltd surged 3.2% intraday on 5 Mar 2026, hitting Rs 444.4.
The stock outperformed Beverages sector and Sensex after a 3-day decline.

news.title: Jefferies maintains buy call on Varun Beverages, cuts target price to ₹550.
news.summary: Jefferies maintains buy call on Varun Beverages, cuts target price to ₹550.

news.title:
Varun Beverages partners with Carlsberg to sell alcoholic drinks in Africa.
A new plant is planned for next year; profit margins may align with India.
news.summary:
Varun Beverages partners with Carlsberg to sell alcoholic drinks in Africa.
A new plant is planned for next year; profit margins may align with India.

news.title:
Varun Beverages aims snacks sales growth in high-teens, nearing $100M revenue in 2-3 years.
Low capex in India for CY '26; focus on South Africa expansion sans Twizza acquisition.
news.summary:
Varun Beverages aims snacks sales growth in high-teens, nearing $100M revenue in 2-3 years.
Low capex in India for CY '26; focus on South Africa expansion sans Twizza acquisition.

news.title:
Varun Beverages sees growth in India and abroad via positive demographics, rising incomes, and robust distribution.
It cites ample capacities, diverse product range, and strong network for sustained profitability.
news.summary:
Varun Beverages sees growth in India and abroad via positive demographics, rising incomes, and robust distribution.
It cites ample capacities, diverse product range, and strong network for sustained profitability.

news.title:
Varun Beverages posted YoY growth in net sales and profit.
Sequentially, net sales fell 14.1% and net profit dropped 66% due to seasonality.
news.summary:
Varun Beverages posted YoY growth in net sales and profit.
Sequentially, net sales fell 14.1% and net profit dropped 66% due to seasonality.

news.title:
BSE Sensex surged 2,073 pts to 83,739; NSE Nifty gained 639 pts to 25,728, marking the biggest single-day gain since May 2025 due to India-US trade deal.
BSE market cap rose ₹12 lakh crore; textile, shrimp, gems, and financial stocks saw strong gains, while PB Fintech and Varun Beverages declined.
news.summary:
BSE Sensex surged 2,073 pts to 83,739; NSE Nifty gained 639 pts to 25,728, marking the biggest single-day gain since May 2025 due to India-US trade deal.
BSE market cap rose ₹12 lakh crore; textile, shrimp, gems, and financial stocks saw strong gains, while PB Fintech and Varun Beverages declined.

news.title:
Varun Beverages confirms minimal capital allocation for alcoholic beverage distribution.
The company expects overall capital expenditure this year to remain limited.
news.summary:
Varun Beverages confirms minimal capital allocation for alcoholic beverage distribution.
The company expects overall capital expenditure this year to remain limited.

news.title:
Varun Beverages' management targets double-digit growth in future.
Confidence expressed during recent earnings call, per concall updates.
news.summary:
Varun Beverages' management targets double-digit growth in future.
Confidence expressed during recent earnings call, per concall updates.

news.title: Varun Beverages Q3 revenue rises to 43.3B INR, up from 38.2B YoY.
news.summary: Varun Beverages Q3 revenue rises to 43.3B INR, up from 38.2B YoY.

news.title:
Varun Beverages, PepsiCo's franchisee, will announce Q4 CY25 results on Feb 3, focusing on revenue, margins, and net profit.
Stock declined 3.3% last week, down 20% YoY; ended at Rs 470.75, outperforming Nifty 50's 2.3% drop.
news.summary:
Varun Beverages, PepsiCo's franchisee, will announce Q4 CY25 results on Feb 3, focusing on revenue, margins, and net profit.
Stock declined 3.3% last week, down 20% YoY; ended at Rs 470.75, outperforming Nifty 50's 2.3% drop.

news.title:
Varun Beverages executed an NSE block trade of ~600,395 shares at Rs. 464.45.
The total trade value amounted to Rs. 27.9 crores.
news.summary:
Varun Beverages executed an NSE block trade of ~600,395 shares at Rs. 464.45.
The total trade value amounted to Rs. 27.9 crores.

news.title:
Varun Beverages Ltd enhanced a corporate guarantee for its subsidiary VBL DMCC from $27.5M to $49.5M, valid till June 30, 2027.
The guarantee, in favor of ICICI Bank's DIFC branch, secures a credit facility with no impact on the parent company.
news.summary:
Varun Beverages Ltd enhanced a corporate guarantee for its subsidiary VBL DMCC from $27.5M to $49.5M, valid till June 30, 2027.
The guarantee, in favor of ICICI Bank's DIFC branch, secures a credit facility with no impact on the parent company.

news.title:
FPIs raised stakes in AWL Agri, RBL Bank, Suzlon Energy, Waaree Energies, and others in Q3.
FPIs reduced holdings in Varun Beverages, HAL, CAMS, and others, selling equities worth Rs 11,766 crore in Q3.
news.summary:
FPIs raised stakes in AWL Agri, RBL Bank, Suzlon Energy, Waaree Energies, and others in Q3.
FPIs reduced holdings in Varun Beverages, HAL, CAMS, and others, selling equities worth Rs 11,766 crore in Q3.

news.title:
HUL, ITC, Varun Beverages expected to drive FMCG Q3 FY26 revival.
Festive demand upswing to benefit large caps like Nestle, Asian Paints, Britannia.
news.summary:
HUL, ITC, Varun Beverages expected to drive FMCG Q3 FY26 revival.

The transaction's total value was ₹60.64 crores on the NSE.

news.title:
Varun Beverages Ltd to acquire 100% of Twizza at ZAR 2,095M (INR 11,187M) via its South African subsidiary.
Twizza, a South African non-alcoholic beverage maker, operates 3 manufacturing plants; acquisition to complete by June 2026.
news.summary:
Varun Beverages Ltd to acquire 100% of Twizza at ZAR 2,095M (INR 11,187M) via its South African subsidiary.
Twizza, a South African non-alcoholic beverage maker, operates 3 manufacturing plants; acquisition to complete by June 2026.
